title: Folding rollback error during HW to LLVM conversion
body:
**Test commit**
[417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8](https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/417a5112947d9889cad54cb5b2110b37978b86b8)

**Description**
The `--convert-hw-to-llvm` pass triggers a fatal error when the dialect conversion framework attempts to roll back IR modifications during the legalization of arith operations.

**Steps to reproduce**
- Minimal MLIR program (test.mlir)
```
"builtin.module"() ({
  "func.func"() <{function_type = () -> index, sym_name = "main"}> ({
    %0 = "arith.constant"() <{value = 1 : index}> : () -> index
    %1 = "arith.constant"() <{value = 2 : index}> : () -> index
    %2 = "arith.addi"(%0, %1) : (index, index) -> index
    "func.return"(%2) : (index) -> ()
  }) : () -> ()
}) : () -> ()
```

**Command**
```
circt-opt --convert-hw-to-llvm test.mlir
```

**Output**
```
LLVM ERROR: op 'arith.addi' folder rollback of IR modifications requested
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: /workdir/builds/circt/bin/circt-opt --convert-hw-to-llvm test.mlir
 #0 0x000055db30ead94b backtrace (/workdir/builds/circt/bin/circt-opt+0x6f4e94b)
 #1 0x000055db3103d747 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:834:13
 #2 0x000055db3103b373 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Signals.cpp:105:18
 #3 0x000055db3103e4b5 SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:426:38
 #4 0x00007fab67246520 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x42520)
 #5 0x00007fab6729a9fc pthread_kill (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x969fc)
 #6 0x00007fab67246476 gsignal (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x42476)
 #7 0x00007fab6722c7f3 abort (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x287f3)
 #8 0x000055db30fb97a7 llvm::report_fatal_error(llvm::Twine const&, bool) /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/ErrorHandling.cpp:137:5
 #9 0x000055db37af6187 std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >::_M_check_length(unsigned long, unsigned long, char const*) const /usr/bin/../lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/../../../../include/c++/11/bits/basic_string.h:331:4
#10 0x000055db37af6187 std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >::append(char const*) /usr/bin/../lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/../../../../include/c++/11/bits/basic_string.h:1259:2

#27 0x000055db37c29b3a llvm::function_ref<void ()>::operator()() const /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:69:12
#28 0x000055db37c29b3a void mlir::MLIRContext::executeAction<mlir::PassExecutionAction, mlir::Pass&>(llvm::function_ref<void ()>, llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::IRUnit>, mlir::Pass&) /workdir/sources/circt/llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/MLIRContext.h:290:7
```
